problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
